_comment: Reference config. Top-level 'defaults' apply to every site; each entry under 'sites' inherits 'defaults' then overrides. Select with: --config configs/default.json --site <name>. Any field here is also settable via CLI flags.

generic-pdfjs._comment: Typical PDF.js style viewer that renders pages to <canvas> and uses arrow keys.

image-slider._comment: Viewer that swaps a big per page with Next/Prev buttons.
